query:
SELECT
            m.id as message_id,
            c.email_address,
            COALESCE(m.from_name, c.name) as "name",
            c.sfs_photo_url
        FROM email_messages m
        INNER JOIN email_contacts c ON c.id = m.from_contact_id
        WHERE m.id = ANY($1)
        AND m.from_contact_id IS NOT NULL
